text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Students at Tracen often compete<n>with each other in scrimmage races<n>as part of their training regimens.<n>Silence Suzuka is taking part in one<n>such race today.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: Still concerned after seeing how<n>troubled she appeared in the library<n>the other day, I decide to come out to<n>observe her.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Suzuka, I take it that you understand<n>the objective of this scrimmage, yes?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Um... To practice the techniques I'll be<n>using in my debut race.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That's correct. Your debut is coming<n>up next month.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: We've been focusing on having you<n>better conserve your speed and<n>energy. It's time to put everything to<n>practice in a proper race.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Okay...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I've been looking forward to this day,<n>Suzuka. Show me how far you've<n>come under your trainer's guidance.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I won't be giving up the lead.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Heh. I couldn't have said it better<n>myself, so right back at you. I'm<n>heading for the gates now.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: All I have to do is remember what she<n>taught me—conserve energy at the<n>start and save it for the final leg...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Right... I've got this. This is the way<n>it's supposed to be done. I'll win for<n>sure.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: The gates spring open on Silence<n>Suzuka's latest scrimmage race.<n>However...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Not yet... I still need to conserve my<n>energy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Suzuka?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: To anyone who witnessed her<n>tremendous lead during her tryout<n>race, today's Silence Suzuka appears<n>to be an entirely different runner.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: No doubt she is trying to implement<n>new speed conservation techniques<n>introduced by her new trainer. But it's<n>hard to say if they're effective...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pant... Gasp...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She finds herself surrounded by her<n>rivals; distress and frustration are<n>uncharacteristicallyscrawled across<n>her face.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: She staggers into the race's final<n>leg...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: This is the homestretch... Now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: W-wait... My legs... don't have the<n>energy...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: This ends here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: As if set off by Air Groove's own<n>final push, the other runners begin to<n>overtake Silence Suzuka one after<n>another, leaving her buried at the<n>back of the pack.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I can't see anything...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: My view... is gone...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eighth place... A regrettable finish<n>indeed.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: You stuck to the plan and performed<n>brilliantly in the first half of the race,<n>but you weren't able to break away<n>in the second half. Why is that?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Suzuka? What's wrong?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... I-I'm sorry... Um...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm honestly... not sure. I don't... I<n>don't know what happened...

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...I see. These things can take some<n>time, so it's safe to say you might not<n>be used to this strategy yet.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: In that case, why don't we push back<n>your debut race? This is not the time<n>to be reckless.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Eh?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: That means canceling my race... A-are<n>you telling me not to run?!

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Please calm down. All I'm saying is<n>that we should wait for a better time.<n>You can race once you've gotten<n>more used to—

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Wait, please! I can run now! I mean, Iwant to run now!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I need to be in the lead—

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But you've yet to master your current<n>running style. Even you can see that,<n>can you not?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Suzuka please listen to me. I'm just<n>trying to help ensure that you are in<n>top form for your debut race.

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Let's take some time to get you<n>accustomed to the correct technique.<n>You will be racing and winning plenty<n>after that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: How much time... is "some time"?

text_block_list.name: Treinadora da Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Pardon? I didn't catch that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry. It's nothing.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm... going home now.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: A dejected Suzuka totters off the<n>track with the faltering steps of a lost<n>child.
